blended.narrative: Mount St. Louis Moonstone is expecting dry conditions over the next 48 hours with little to no accumulation. Looking ahead, 14 inches possible over the next 14 days. Mild temps with highs near 53°F.

daily_summary.narrative: Tomorrow: light rain showers, highs of 48°F.
Wednesday: 2.0" of snow, highs of 42°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.
Saturday: 2.5" of snow, highs of 27°F. Expect powder.
Sunday: 7" of snow, highs of 29°F. Expect powder.
